failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Blockage due to solid formation or debris
failure_modes.mitigation: Regular maintenance and inspection; install filter upstream

failure_modes.mode: Overheating due to inadequate heat transfer
failure_modes.cause: High DES viscosity impedes efficient heat dissipation
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure proper mixing and flow rates; monitor temperature closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve function with varying flow rates and check for blockages
Conduct thermal profiling at different flow rates to ensure adequate heat transfer
